title: Flumazenil
body_html:
Flumazenil Key Points:
  • Benzodiazepine antagonist
  • Half life shorter than midazolam and diazepam
  • It can be given intravenously but not intra-muscularly
  • May cause withdrawal symptoms in patients who are dependent on benzodiazepines and can precipitate convulsions therefore should be used with caution.
3
100
Pharmacology
